ham: Hello, this is a reminder from the City Library. Your borrowed book 'The Great Gatsby' was due on 25-Oct-2023. Please return it by 30-Oct-2023 to avoid a late fee of INR 10 per day. If you have any questions, call 1234567890 or email library@city.com. Thank you!
